author: shmolf
description: Specify a remote URL as the background image, and a few settings to tweak the experience.
name: Background Image

releases.author: shmolf
releases.description:
Addressing two issues:
- https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/issues/17 - Adds some left and right padding around the lines when editing text.
- https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/issues/19 - Adds support for selecting the Background Positioning, default is `center`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0

releases.author: shmolf
releases.description:

* Added background in reading view, updated to 1.2.0 and synced package-lock.json version with package.json and manifest.json by @nicolello-dev in https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/pull/14

## New Contributors
* @nicolello-dev made their first contribution in https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/pull/14

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: shmolf
releases.description:
Initial release of my first Obsidian Plugin.

## What's Changed
* feat(background): new background feature by @shmolf in https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/pull/1
* feat(contrast): add background for contrast in the input area by @shmolf in https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/pull/2
* Version 1 by @shmolf in https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/pull/3

## New Contributors
* @shmolf made their first contribution in https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shmolf/obsidian-editor-background/commits/1.0.0
